name: TAO Range Failure Reacceptance v1
thesis: TAO 4h is the best-fit primary lane for a chop-first range-failure reacceptance test. The edge should come from broad reacceptance after a false break, not exact one-bar reversal timing.
edge_mechanism: range failure mean reversion after value reacceptance
invalidation_condition: Abort if walk-forward testing shows zero trades on valid data, contradictory filter behavior, weak blind-window participation, or no post-cost edge.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: False breaks from local balance that reverse once value is reaccepted in a fully choppy regime.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: TAO 4h chop should create repeated failed directional probes; once acceptance returns, trapped breakout traders can fuel the move back toward balance.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: TAO 4h is the best-fit lane in the basket for explicit chop mean reversion because the current regime distribution is 100% CHOP.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If TAO chop still lacks enough excursion-and-reclaim density, even a correct mean-reversion concept may under-participate.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If trade count is low but the logic is coherent, widen the reacceptance band before changing exits.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; excursion and reacceptance are complementary
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: reduced by proximity-to-band logic instead of exact reversal candles

long: Take profit: EMA_50 or 1.5 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
short: Take profit: EMA_50 or 1.5 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
